title: Full-Stack TypeScript Engineer
description: PixelCraft Studio is an award-winning digital agency building products for global brands. You'll work across the full stack on 3-5 simultaneous projects, using Next.js, Node.js, and headless CMS platforms. You thrive in fast-paced environments and love polished UI.
responsibilities: Deliver full-stack features across multiple client projects per sprint
Build pixel-perfect, accessible components from Figma designs
Integrate third-party APIs and headless CMS platforms
Conduct code reviews and uphold engineering standards
